title: Evangelion 30 screenings how was it
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 screenings, how was it? Post by EyesTeethSoul » Thu Jan 16, 2014 9:12 am So what has everyones experience with Evangelion 3.0 screening been like so far? Over here in Ireland, our theatre screened all 3 films back to back and the first 10 people there (i.e. Me) got a free poster from the offical Evangelion store, also it was subtitled. I have to say that I couldn't ask for a better movie-going experience, the second the first film started everyone was completely silent for its entireity

[]: Evangelion 3.0 screenings, how was it? Post by EyesTeethSoul » Thu Jan 16, 2014 9:12 am So what has everyones experience with Evangelion 3.0 screening been like so far? Over here in Ireland, our theatre screened all 3 films back to back and the first 10 people there (i.e. Me) got a free poster from the offical Evangelion store, also it was subtitled. I have to say that I couldn't ask for a better movie-going experience, the second the first film started everyone was completely silent for its entireity
